name: carlquist-publications-dataset
title: Sherwin Carlquist Publications Dataset
description: Comprehensive bibliographic metadata for 343 scientific publications by botanist Sherwin Carlquist (1930-2021), spanning his career from 1956 through his later works. Includes companion lookup tables for journals and co-authors with Wikidata identifiers.

resources.name: carlquist_publications
resources.title: Carlquist Publications
resources.description: Main bibliographic dataset. One record per publication. All 343 publications include Sherwin Carlquist as author or co-author.

fields.name: title
fields.title: Title
fields.description: Full title of the publication.

fields.name: container-title
fields.title: Container Title
fields.description: Name of the journal, book, or other container in which the work appears. Empty for standalone books.

fields.name: year
fields.title: Year
fields.description: Four-digit publication year.

fields.name: issued
fields.title: Issued Date
fields.description: Full or partial publication date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD). Precision varies by available source information.

fields.name: author
fields.title: Author
fields.description: Author name(s) in 'Last, First' format; multiple authors separated by semicolons. All publications include Sherwin Carlquist as author or co-author.

fields.name: editor
fields.title: Editor
fields.description: Editor name(s) of the containing book, in 'Last, First' format, separated by semicolons. Populated only for book chapters (type=chapter).

fields.name: publisher
fields.title: Publisher
fields.description: Name of the publishing organization. Required for books and book chapters; empty for journal articles.

fields.name: volume
fields.title: Volume
fields.description: Volume number of the journal or book series. Stored as string to accommodate non-numeric designations.

fields.name: issue
fields.title: Issue
fields.description: Issue or part number within a volume. Stored as string to accommodate non-numeric designations.

fields.name: page
fields.title: Page Range
fields.description: Page range (e.g. '226-239') or single page number. Empty for complete books.

fields.name: type
fields.title: Publication Type
fields.description: Publication type following CSL-JSON controlled vocabulary.

fields.name: container-ISSN
fields.title: Container ISSN
fields.description: Print International Standard Serial Number for the containing journal. Format: ####-####.

fields.name: container-eISSN
fields.title: Container eISSN
fields.description: Electronic International Standard Serial Number for the containing journal. Format: ####-####.

fields.name: container-ISBN
fields.title: Container ISBN
fields.description: International Standard Book Number for the containing book. Applies to book chapters; may be 10 or 13 digits.

fields.name: container-OCLC-number
fields.title: Container OCLC Number
fields.description: OCLC WorldCat control number for the containing book. Useful for library catalog lookups.

fields.name: DOI
fields.title: DOI
fields.description: Digital Object Identifier. Format: 10.####/suffix. Coverage is approximately 40%; stronger for post-2000 publications.

fields.name: wikidata-id
fields.title: Wikidata ID
fields.description: Wikidata QID for this publication item. Format: Q followed by digits. Use to construct URL: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/{wikidata-id}.

fields.name: wikidata-url
fields.title: Wikidata URL
fields.description: Full URL to the Wikidata item for this publication. Constructed from wikidata-id as https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/{wikidata-id}.

fields.name: URL
fields.title: URL
fields.description: Web address for accessing the publication. May include JSTOR, publisher, BHL, or institutional repository links.

fields.name: language
fields.title: Language
fields.description: Language of the publication as an ISO 639-1 two-letter code. All publications in this dataset are in English.

resources.name: carlquist_journals
resources.title: Carlquist Journals
resources.description: Lookup table of all journals represented in the publications dataset, with Wikidata identifiers and ISSN values.

fields.name: journal-title
fields.title: Journal Title
fields.description: Full journal title.

fields.name: wikidata-url
fields.title: Wikidata URL
fields.description: Full URL to the Wikidata item for this journal.

fields.name: wikidata-id
fields.title: Wikidata ID
fields.description: Wikidata QID for this journal item. Format: Q followed by digits.

fields.name: ISSN
fields.title: ISSN
fields.description: Print International Standard Serial Number. Format: ####-####.

fields.name: eISSN
fields.title: eISSN
fields.description: Electronic International Standard Serial Number. Format: ####-####.

resources.name: carlquist_authors
resources.title: Carlquist Co-Authors
resources.description: Lookup table of all co-authors appearing in the publications dataset, with name variants and Wikidata identifiers.

fields.name: author-as-cited
fields.title: Author (as cited)
fields.description: Author name exactly as it appears in the publications CSV, in 'Last, First' format.

fields.name: author-full
fields.title: Author Full Name
fields.description: Expanded author name with full or more complete given name where known.

fields.name: author-full-reconciled
fields.title: Author Full Name (Reconciled)
fields.description: Canonical author name as reconciled against Wikidata or authoritative sources.

fields.name: wikidata-url
fields.title: Wikidata URL
fields.description: Full URL to the Wikidata item for this person.

fields.name: wikidata-id
fields.title: Wikidata ID
fields.description: Wikidata QID for this person. Format: Q followed by digits. Multiple rows may share a QID when the same person is cited under variant name forms.
